summary: Iteration 102: BIQc Platform Transformation Sprint QA - Brand correction & UI consistency verified across all viewports (1440px desktop, 820px tablet, 390px mobile). Old orange B gradient box logo confirmed restored throughout website and app. No biqc-logo.png image references found. Font tokens imported from design-system. Console.debug calls properly guarded for development-only.

brand_verification.website_nav_logo_desktop_1440: PASS - Orange gradient B box (div not img) with white 'B' text + BIQc text
brand_verification.website_nav_logo_tablet_820: PASS - Orange gradient B box visible
brand_verification.website_nav_logo_mobile_390: PASS - Orange gradient B box visible with hamburger menu
brand_verification.website_footer_logo: PASS - Orange B box + BIQc text, no img tags
brand_verification.app_dashboard_header_desktop: PASS - Orange B box + 'Strategy Squad' text visible
brand_verification.app_dashboard_header_mobile: PASS - Orange B box visible in header
brand_verification.login_page_logo: PASS - 'BIQc' text logo (no image), orange B box with 'powered by The Strategy Squad'
brand_verification.no_biqc_logo_png: PASS - No biqc-logo.png references anywhere in app

desktop_1440px.homepage: PASS - Hero, stats (6hrs, 83%, $47K), intelligence diagram visible, no overflow
desktop_1440px.advisor_page: PASS - Greeting visible, Strategy Squad header, SoundBoard panel visible on right
desktop_1440px.decisions_page: PASS - 'Decision Tracker' title visible, New Decision button present
desktop_1440px.competitive_benchmark_page: PASS - 'Competitive Benchmark' title with 'Weekly Digital Footprint score & industry percentile ranking' subtitle, Refresh button

tablet_820px.homepage: PASS - Nav items visible, no horizontal overflow
tablet_820px.advisor_page: PASS - Content visible (with tutorial modal), bottom nav visible

mobile_390px.homepage: PASS - Text readable, no horizontal overflow, hamburger menu visible
mobile_390px.advisor_page: PASS - No auth loading screen blocking, bottom nav with 5 items (Overview, Market, Revenue, Alerts, More), orange SoundBoard FAB
mobile_390px.login_page: PASS - Form visible and usable, email/password inputs visible, Sign in button visible

font_consistency.headings: PASS - Using Cormorant Garamond (serif) via fontFamily.display from tokens.js
font_consistency.body_text: PASS - Using Inter (sans-serif) via fontFamily.body from tokens.js
font_consistency.labels_mono: PASS - Using JetBrains Mono via fontFamily.mono from tokens.js

console_logs.console_debug_guarded: PASS - console.debug calls in analytics.js and telemetry.js are guarded with NODE_ENV === 'development'
console_logs.console_error_warn: INFO - console.error/warn calls present for error handling (appropriate)

critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: Old orange B gradient box logo restored across all pages (div-based, not img)
VERIFIED: No biqc-logo.png references in public/ folder or code
VERIFIED: fontFamily.display = Cormorant Garamond (serif) for headings
VERIFIED: fontFamily.body = Inter (sans-serif) for body text
VERIFIED: fontFamily.mono = JetBrains Mono for labels/mono text
VERIFIED: console.debug calls properly guarded for development-only
INFO: Console.error/warn calls present for error handling - expected behavior

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All brand and UI consistency tests passed

context_for_next_testing_agent: Brand QA complete. Old orange B gradient box logo (div-based, not img) confirmed restored across website nav, footer, app dashboard header, and login page. Font tokens from design-system/tokens.js properly applied. No biqc-logo.png references. Console.debug calls guarded for development-only. All viewports (1440px desktop, 820px tablet, 390px mobile) tested and passing. Tutorial modals appear on first visit but are dismissable.
